tasks.label: Smoke Backend JWT
tasks.command: set +H && ADMIN_TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"admin@test.com","password":"1234"}' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d).token))") && CREADOR_TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"creador.pedidos@test.com","password":"1234"}' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d).token))") && CONDUCTOR_TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/login -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"conductor1@test.com","password":"1234"}' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d).token))") && PEDIDO_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/pedidos -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $CREADOR_TOKEN" -d '{"cliente":"Chequeo General","direccion":"Av. Validacion 123, Montevideo","levantado":"con_mostrador","levantado_en_mostrador":"Cajas","sin_levantado_mostrador":false,"items":[{"codigo":"CHK-001","nombre":"Item chequeo","cantidad":1,"precio":10}]}' | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>console.log(JSON.parse(d).id))") && ASIGNAR=$(curl -s -o /tmp/asignar_general.out -w '%{http_code}' -X POST http://localhost:3000/pedidos/$PEDIDO_ID/asignar -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_TOKEN" -d '{"conductor_id":2}') && ACEPTAR=$(curl -s -o /tmp/aceptar_general.out -w '%{http_code}' -X POST http://localhost:3000/pedidos/$PEDIDO_ID/aceptar -H "Authorization: Bearer $CONDUCTOR_TOKEN") && ADMIN_NOTIFS=$(curl -s http://localhost:3000/notificaciones -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_TOKEN" | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>{const arr=JSON.parse(d); console.log(arr.some(n=>String(n.pedido_id)===process.argv[1]) ? 'yes' : 'no')})" "$PEDIDO_ID") && CREADOR_NOTIFS=$(curl -s http://localhost:3000/notificaciones -H "Authorization: Bearer $CREADOR_TOKEN" | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>{const arr=JSON.parse(d); console.log(arr.some(n=>String(n.pedido_id)===process.argv[1]) ? 'yes' : 'no')})" "$PEDIDO_ID") && printf 'pedido=%s asignar=%s aceptar=%s admin_notif=%s creador_notif=%s\n' "$PEDIDO_ID" "$ASIGNAR" "$ACEPTAR" "$ADMIN_NOTIFS" "$CREADOR_NOTIFS"

tasks.label: Cleanup Smoke Pedido
tasks.command: cd /Users/eduardomorales/Desktop/PruebaAndroid/backend-complete && node --input-type=module -e "import sqlite3 from 'sqlite3'; const db = new sqlite3.Database('barraca.db'); db.get(\"SELECT id FROM pedidos WHERE cliente = 'Chequeo General' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1\", (err, row) => { if (err) { console.error(err); process.exit(1); } if (!row) { console.log('sin pedido temporal'); db.close(); return; } db.serialize(() => { db.run('DELETE FROM notificaciones WHERE pedido_id = ?', [row.id]); db.run('DELETE FROM items_pedido WHERE pedido_id = ?', [row.id]); db.run('DELETE FROM entregas WHERE pedido_id = ?', [row.id]); db.run('DELETE FROM pedidos WHERE id = ?', [row.id], function(deleteErr) { if (deleteErr) { console.error(deleteErr); process.exit(1); } console.log('pedido temporal eliminado', row.id); db.close(); }); }); });"
